YUNO_MOD_RELIC_RADAR_DIARY_RELIC.title: Radar Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_RADAR_DIARY_RELIC.descrip: At the start of your turn, [gold]Foresee[/gold] [blue]3[/blue], draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_RADAR_DIARY_RELIC.flavor: Like a radar, it senses everything around you.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_SEARCH_DIARY_RELIC.title: Search Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_SEARCH_DIARY_RELIC.descri: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_BLOOD_DAGGER_RELIC.title: Blood Dagger
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_BLOOD_DAGGER_RELIC.descri: At the start of combat, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Cripple[/gold] to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_BREED_DIARY_RELIC.title: Breed Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_BREED_DIARY_RELIC.descrip: Once per combat. When you play a Power card, add [blue]1[/blue] copy of it with Ethereal to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_KILLING_DIARY_RELIC.title: Killing Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_KILLING_DIARY_RELIC.descr: Enemies with attacking intent take [blue]50[/blue]% more damage.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_SEEK_DIARY_RELIC.title: Seek Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_SEEK_DIARY_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, add [blue]1[/blue] Skill card from your draw pile to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_SEEK_DIARY_RELIC.selectio: Choose [blue]1[/blue] Skill card to add to your hand.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_SEEK_DIARY_RELIC.flavor: When there are no cases, it's just a brick.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_GRAFFITI_DIARY_RELIC.desc: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies. When an enemy dies with [gold]Poison[/gold], transfer its stacks to a random enemy.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE_DIARY_RELIC.desc: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] cards, then choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your hand to place on top of your draw pile.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_EXCHANGE_DIARY_RELIC.sele: Choose [blue]1[/blue] card to place on top of your draw pile.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_ESCAPE_DIARY_RELIC.title: Escape Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_ESCAPE_DIARY_RELIC.descri: At the start of your turn, if any enemy intends to attack, gain Block equal to the number of Diaries held per attacking enemy. This effect is doubled on prime-numbered turns.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_JUSTICE_DIARY_RELIC.title: Justice Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_JUSTICE_DIARY_RELIC.descr: When you lose HP, deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_JUSTICE_DIARY_RELIC.flavo: Victory is justice! The defeated are evil!
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_CLAIRVOYANCE_RELIC.title: Clairvoyance Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_CLAIRVOYANCE_RELIC.descri: At the start of combat, temporarily gain a random Common relic for this combat.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_FEED_DIARY_RELIC.title: Feed Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_FEED_DIARY_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your draw pile. When you play it, if it is an Attack, its base damage +[blue]1[/blue]; if it is a Skill, its base Block +[blue]1[/blue]. Lasts this combat only.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_THE_WATCHER_RELIC.title: The Watcher Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_THE_WATCHER_RELIC.descrip: At the start of combat, add [blue]1[/blue] Uncommon or Rare card from another class to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_REVOLVER_RELIC.title: Revolver
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_REVOLVER_RELIC.descriptio: When you exit [gold]Gun[/gold], deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_USELESS_CLOCK_RELIC.title: Useless Clock
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_USELESS_CLOCK_RELIC.descr: Once per turn. When you play a [gold]Strike[/gold], play a [gold]Defend[/gold] from your draw pile, or when you play a [gold]Defend[/gold], play a [gold]Strike[/gold] from your draw pile.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_BOOMERANG_RELIC.title: Boomerang
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_BOOMERANG_RELIC.descripti: When an enemy dies, transfer its [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] stacks to a random enemy.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_DEUS_NUCLEUS_RELIC.title: Deus's Nucleus
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_DEUS_NUCLEUS_RELIC.descri: Whenever you gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength, gain [blue]2[/blue] Vigor.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_DEUS_NUCLEUS_RELIC.flavor: When you gain one point of Strength, you gain one point of Strength.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_DIAMOND_RING_RELIC.title: Diamond Ring
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_DIAMOND_RING_RELIC.descri: The first time you lose HP each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Buffer.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_MURUMURU_CROWN_RELIC.desc: At the start of combat, add [blue]1[/blue] Orb to your draw pile.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_FLASH_DIARY_RELIC.title: Flash Flash Diary
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_FLASH_DIARY_RELIC.descrip: At the start of combat, a random card in your draw pile gains Replay [blue]1[/blue].
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_FLASH_DIARY_RELIC.flavor: It records your shining moments. As a sub-diary, it does not increase your diary count.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_HYDRANGEA_RELIC.title: Hydrangea
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_HYDRANGEA_RELIC.descripti: The first time you play a card each combat, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy.
YUNO_MOD_RELIC_GLOVE_DOLL_RELIC.title: Glove Doll
